title: Show-your-work dashboard feed
description: The data the dashboard renders. This file IS the foundation: dashboard-template.html reads it and needs nothing else. Keeping it fresh is the CONNECTION you add later (a webhook, a sync script, or hand-editing). Point the template at it by setting FEED_URL to this file's path.

items.description: One deliverable: what it is, the AI tool and role that touched it, the output, and where it stands.

tool.description: The AI tool and its role, written as 'Tool · role'. The text before ' · ' is counted as the tool for the 'AI tools used' stat.

output.description: What came out of it, in a few words.

status.description: Where it stands. 'done' renders as Shipped, 'wip' as In progress, 'todo' as Planned.
